plugin.name: PupPaths
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Step-by-step pup pathing with named routes
plugin.description:
PupPaths: Walk named paths one room at a time. Type the path keyword to advance. Commands: pp help - Show help pp list - List all defined paths pp add <name> <dirs> - Add a path pp del <name> - Delete a path pp reset <name> - Reset position on a path to step 1 pp on / pp off - Enable or disable PupPaths pp <name> - Advance one step on that path (eg: pp skd) On the first clean run from step 1 to the end, the room numbers along a path are recorded via GMCP. After that, stepping off the path (eg backtracking a room) lets PupPaths recognize where you are and continue from that room instead of resetting.
Path segments are separated by ';'. A run of direction letters/numbers is a speedwalk (eg 3e2s); anything else is a command (eg pull lever, enter portal). PupPaths auto-detects via GMCP whether a command moved you and advances either way, so you can just write the commands inline: pp add temple 3n;pull lever;e2e;enter portal;2s;op d;d Optional prefixes force the behaviour if you ever need to (eg on a laggy MUD): do:<command> command that does NOT change rooms — advance at once (eg do:op d) go:<command> command that DOES move you — wait for the room to change

muclient.script:
pp = {}
local dataFile = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 6) .. "PupPaths.dat" local configFile = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 6) .. "PupPathsConfig.dat"
local paths = {} local ppEnabled = true local ppMoving = false local ppCharge = false local ppCombat = false local ppPending = nil -- { pname, pos } waiting for room confirmation local currentRoom = nil -- last room number seen via GMCP room.info local ppSeq = 0 -- step counter; lets a late auto-command timer detect staleness
-- Theme palette (Eric's @x099 / @x045 / @W). The variable names are kept for the -- existing semantic usage; they now resolve to the themed colours: -- @x099 #875FFF (purple accent) @x045 #00D7FF (cyan labels) @W #FFFFFF (white values) local BG = "black" local GREEN = "#875FFF" -- @x099 : plugin prefix, headers, "good" status local WHITE = "#FFFFFF" -- @W : path names, primary text local CYAN = "#00D7FF" -- @x045 : labels and descriptive text local RED = "#00FF87" -- @x048 : step numbers/counts, notices, and [recording] state local YELLOW = "#875FFF" -- @x099 : directions/commands to run, help placeholders
local function CN(...) ColourNote(...) end local function Msg(...) CN(GREEN, BG, "[PupPaths] ", ...) end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- Direction expansion ---------------------------------------------------------
local dirMap = { n = "n", s = "s", e = "e", w = "w", u = "u", d = "d", }
local opCmds = { ["op n"] = true, ["op s"] = true, ["op e"] = true, ["op w"] = true, ["op u"] = true, ["op d"] = true, ["op north"] = true, ["op south"] = true, ["op east"] = true, ["op west"] = true, ["op up"] = true, ["op down"] = true, }
local function parseDirs(dirStr) local result = {} local segments = {} for seg in (dirStr .. ";"):gmatch("([^;]*);") do table.insert(segments, seg) end for _, seg in ipairs(segments) do seg = seg:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") local lower = seg:lower() if #seg == 0 then -- skip elseif lower:match("^go:") then -- command that MOVES us to a new room: wait for room.info confirm local cmd = seg:sub(4):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if #cmd > 0 then table.insert(result, { type = "movecmd", cmd = cmd }) end elseif lower:match("^do:") then -- command that does NOT change rooms: advance immediately local cmd = seg:sub(4):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if #cmd > 0 then table.insert(result, { type = "cmd", cmd = cmd }) end elseif opCmds[lower] then table.insert(result, { type = "cmd", cmd = lower }) elseif not lower:match("^[%dnsewud]+$") then -- Not a pure speedwalk (has spaces or non-direction letters): a command. -- Move-vs-stay is auto-detected at run time via GMCP. Original case kept. table.insert(result, { type = "autocmd", cmd = seg }) else local s = lower local i = 1 while i <= #s do local numStr = s:match("^(%d+)", i) local count = 1 if numStr then count = tonumber(numStr) i = i + #numStr end local ch = s:sub(i, i) if dirMap[ch] then for _ = 1, count do table.insert(result, { type = "move", dir = dirMap[ch] }) end end i = i + 1 end end end return result end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- Persistence ---------------------------------------------------------
local function SaveConfig() local f = io.open(configFile, "w") if not f then return end f:write("enabled=" .. (ppEnabled and "1" or "0") .. "\n") f:write("charge=" .. (ppCharge and "1" or "0") .. "\n") f:close() end
local function LoadConfig() local f = io.open(configFile, "r") if not f then return end for line in f:lines() do local e = line:match("^enabled=([01])$") if e then ppEnabled = (e == "1") end local c = line:match("^charge=([01])$") if c then ppCharge = (c == "1") end end f:close() end
-- Data file format (one path per line): -- name|dirs|pos|recorded|idx-room,idx-room,... -- The trailing field is a comma list of "position-roomnumber" pairs captured -- while walking the path. Old 3-field lines (name|dirs|pos) still load.
local function SaveData() local f = io.open(dataFile, "w") if not f then return end for name, p in pairs(paths) do local roomList = {} if p.rooms then for i, r in pairs(p.rooms) do table.insert(roomList, i .. "-" .. r) end end f:write(name .. "|" .. p.dirs .. "|" .. tostring(p.pos) .. "|" .. (p.recorded and "1" or "0") .. "|" .. table.concat(roomList, ",") .. "\n") end f:close() end
local function LoadData() paths = {} local f = io.open(dataFile, "r") if not f then return end for line in f:lines() do -- New 5-field format local name, dirs, pos, rec, roomStr = line:match("^([^|]+)|([^|]+)|(%d+)|([01])|(.*)$") if name and dirs then local p = { dirs = dirs, pos = tonumber(pos) or 1, recorded = (rec == "1"), rooms = {}, } for idx, rm in roomStr:gmatch("(%d+)%-(%-?%d+)") do p.rooms[tonumber(idx)] = tonumber(rm) end paths[name] = p else -- Old 3-field format (pre-1.1): no rooms recorded yet local oname, odirs, opos = line:match("^([^|]+)|([^|]+)|(%d+)$") if oname and odirs then paths[oname] = { dirs = odirs, pos = tonumber(opos) or 1, recorded = false, rooms = {}, } end end end f:close() end
-- True once every step position 1..total has a captured room number, -- i.e. the path has been walked cleanly from start to finish. local function recordingComplete(p, total) if total <= 0 or not p.rooms then return false end for i = 1, total do if not p.rooms[i] then return false end end return true end
-- Map room number -> earliest step position standing in that room. local function buildRoomIndex(p, total) local idx = {} if p.rooms then for i = 1, total do local r = p.rooms[i] if r and not idx[r] then idx[r] = i end end end return idx end
-- Room each step is executed FROM, normalized for positioning. A stay-put command -- step (eg "op w") doesn't move you, so it shares the room of the next move. This -- collapses consecutive same-room steps and prevents a leading door step (whose -- recorded room could differ) from splitting step 1 and step 2 onto two rooms. local function buildEffectiveRooms(p, steps, total) local eff = {} local nextMoveRoom = nil for i = total, 1, -1 do local tok = steps[i] local r = p.rooms and p.rooms[i] if tok and tok.type == "cmd" then eff[i] = nextMoveRoom or r -- door/stay-put: inherit the next move's room else eff[i] = r -- move / movecmd / autocmd: its own room if r then nextMoveRoom = r end end end return eff end
-- Reached the end of a path: announce, mark recorded if the run was clean, reset. local function reachedEnd(p, pname, total) CN(RED, BG, "You have reached the end.") if not p.recorded and recordingComplete(p, total) then p.recorded = true Msg(GREEN, BG, "Path '", WHITE, BG, pname, GREEN, BG, "' fully recorded (", RED, BG, tostring(total), GREEN, BG, " steps). It will now resume mid-path instead of resetting.") end p.pos = 1 end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- pp.step — called only by a registered path alias ---------------------------------------------------------
function pp.step(pname) if not ppEnabled then return end
pname = pname:lower() local p = paths[pname] if not p then return end
if ppCombat then CN(RED, BG, "In Combat.") return end
-- We need to know the current room: to record step 1 of a new path, and to -- position a recorded path from wherever you're standing. After a reload we -- may not know it yet — ask the MUD, then have them retry. if not currentRoom then Execute("request room") Msg(YELLOW, BG, "Getting your current room — press ", WHITE, BG, "pp " .. pname, YELLOW, BG, " again.") return end
local steps = parseDirs(p.dirs) local total = #steps
-- For a fully recorded path, your position follows the room you're actually in. -- If you're already correctly placed for the room you're standing in, keep going -- (so door/command steps that don't move you still advance). Otherwise jump to the -- earliest step belonging to this room — letting you walk onto the path anywhere -- and continue. Effective rooms collapse stay-put door steps with the move that -- follows, so a leading "op w" can't strand you on the wrong step. if p.recorded and currentRoom > 0 then local eff = buildEffectiveRooms(p, steps, total) if eff[p.pos] ~= currentRoom then local target = nil for i = 1, total do if eff[i] == currentRoom then target = i break end end if target then p.pos = target else Msg(YELLOW, BG, "You're not on a recorded room of path '", WHITE, BG, pname, YELLOW, BG, "'. Walk onto it and try again.") return end end end
if p.pos > total then reachedEnd(p, pname, total) SaveData() return end
local token = steps[p.pos]
-- Record the room we're standing in for this position (for mid-path resume) if currentRoom and currentRoom > 0 then p.rooms = p.rooms or {} p.rooms[p.pos] = currentRoom end
if token.type == "cmd" then CN(GREEN, BG, "[PupPaths] ", WHITE, BG, pname .. " ", CYAN, BG, "Step ", RED, BG, tostring(p.pos), CYAN, BG, "/", RED, BG, tostring(total), CYAN, BG, " -> ", YELLOW,BG, "[" .. token.cmd .. "]") ppMoving = false -- cmd steps advance immediately since they don't move rooms p.pos = p.pos + 1 Execute(token.cmd) elseif token.type == "movecmd" then CN(GREEN, BG, "[PupPaths] ", WHITE, BG, pname .. " ", CYAN, BG, "Step ", RED, BG, tostring(p.pos), CYAN, BG, "/", RED, BG, tostring(total), CYAN, BG, " -> ", YELLOW,BG, token.cmd) -- Command that moves us — wait for GMCP room.info to confirm, like a direction ppMoving = true ppPending = { pname = pname, total = total } Execute(token.cmd) elseif token.type == "autocmd" then CN(GREEN, BG, "[PupPaths] ", WHITE, BG, pname .. " ", CYAN, BG, "Step ", RED, BG, tostring(p.pos), CYAN, BG, "/", RED, BG, tostring(total), CYAN, BG, " -> ", YELLOW,BG, token.cmd) -- Command of unknown type: run it, then let GMCP decide. If a room.info -- arrives it was a move (confirm branch advances); if not, the timer fires -- and advances it as a non-moving command. ppSeq = ppSeq + 1 ppMoving = true ppPending = { pname = pname, total = total, seq = ppSeq } Execute(token.cmd) DoAfterSpecial(0.7, "pp._cmdTimeout(" .. ppSeq .. ")", 12) -- 12 = sendto.script else local sendDir = ppCharge and ("charge " .. token.dir) or token.dir CN(GREEN, BG, "[PupPaths] ", WHITE, BG, pname .. " ", CYAN, BG, "Step ", RED, BG, tostring(p.pos), CYAN, BG, "/", RED, BG, tostring(total), CYAN, BG, " -> ", YELLOW,BG, sendDir) -- Don't advance pos yet — wait for GMCP room.info to confirm we moved ppMoving = true ppPending = { pname = pname, total = total } Execute(sendDir) end
SaveData() end
-- Called ~0.7s after an auto-detected command if NO room.info arrived, -- meaning the command did not move us — advance it as a non-moving step. function pp._cmdTimeout(seq) seq = tonumber(seq) if not (ppMoving and ppPending) then return end if ppPending.seq ~= seq then return end -- a newer step superseded this one
local pname = ppPending.pname local total = ppPending.total ppMoving = false ppPending = nil
local p = paths[pname] if p then p.pos = p.pos + 1 if p.pos > total then reachedEnd(p, pname, total) end SaveData() end end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- Commands ---------------------------------------------------------
function pp.help() CN(GREEN, BG, "PupPaths Help") CN(WHITE, BG, "pp help ", CYAN, BG, "- Show this help") CN(WHITE, BG, "pp list ", CYAN, BG, "- List all paths and current position") CN(WHITE, BG, "pp add ", YELLOW, BG, "<name> <dirs>", WHITE, BG, " ", CYAN, BG, "- Add a path eg: pp add skd 3e2s;op d;d2sw3s") CN(WHITE, BG, "pp del ", YELLOW, BG, "<name>", WHITE, BG, " ", CYAN, BG, "- Delete a path") CN(WHITE, BG, "pp reset ", YELLOW, BG, "<name>", WHITE, BG, " ", CYAN, BG, "- Reset position on a path back to step 1") CN(WHITE, BG, "pp on ", CYAN, BG, "- Enable PupPaths") CN(WHITE, BG, "pp off ", CYAN, BG, "- Disable PupPaths") CN(WHITE, BG, "ppcharge ", CYAN, BG, "- Toggle charge mode on/off (prepends 'charge' to each direction)") CN(YELLOW, BG, "pp <name>", WHITE, BG, " ", CYAN, BG, "- Advance one step on that path eg: pp skd") CN(GREEN, BG, "Records each path's rooms on the first full run; then resumes mid-path (eg after a backtrack) instead of resetting.") CN(GREEN, BG, "Commands in a path (eg pull lever, enter portal) just work — move-or-stay is auto-detected via GMCP.") CN(GREEN, BG, "Optional override prefixes: ", WHITE, BG, "do:<cmd>", GREEN, BG, " stays put; ", WHITE, BG, "go:<cmd>", GREEN, BG, " moves you.") CN(GREEN, BG, "Status: ", ppEnabled and GREEN or RED, BG, ppEnabled and "ENABLED" or "DISABLED") CN(GREEN, BG, "Charge: ", ppCharge and GREEN or RED, BG, ppCharge and "ENABLED" or "DISABLED") end
function pp.list() if next(paths) == nil then Msg(WHITE, BG, "No paths defined. Use: pp add <name> <dirs>") return end CN(GREEN, BG, "PupPaths — Defined Paths") for pname, p in pairs(paths) do local steps = parseDirs(p.dirs) local total = #steps CN(WHITE, BG, pname .. " ", CYAN, BG, "Step: ", RED, BG, tostring(p.pos), CYAN, BG, "/", RED, BG, tostring(total), CYAN, BG, " ", p.recorded and GREEN or RED, BG, p.recorded and "[recorded]" or "[recording]", CYAN, BG, " Dirs: ", WHITE, BG, p.dirs) end end
function pp.add(name, dirs) local pname = name:lower():match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") dirs = dirs:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
local steps = parseDirs(dirs) if #steps == 0 then Msg(RED, BG, "No valid directions found in: " .. dirs) return end
paths[pname] = { dirs = dirs, pos = 1, recorded = false, rooms = {} } SaveData()
Msg(WHITE, BG, "Path '", GREEN, BG, pname, WHITE, BG, "' added with ", RED, BG, tostring(#steps), WHITE, BG, " steps.") end
function pp.del(name) local pname = name:lower():match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if not paths[pname] then Msg(RED, BG, "No path named '" .. pname .. "'.") return end paths[pname] = nil SaveData() Msg(WHITE, BG, "Path '", GREEN, BG, pname, WHITE, BG, "' deleted.") end
function pp.reset(name) local pname = name:lower():match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if not paths[pname] then Msg(RED, BG, "No path named '" .. pname .. "'.") return end paths[pname].pos = 1 SaveData() Msg(WHITE, BG, "Path '", GREEN, BG, pname, WHITE, BG, "' reset to step 1.") end
function pp.charge() ppCharge = not ppCharge SaveConfig() if ppCharge then Msg(WHITE, BG, "Charge mode ", GREEN, BG, "ENABLED", WHITE, BG, ". Directions will be sent as 'charge <dir>'.") else Msg(WHITE, BG, "Charge mode ", RED, BG, "DISABLED", WHITE, BG, ". Directions will be sent normally.") end end
function pp.on() ppEnabled = true SaveConfig() Msg(WHITE, BG, "PupPaths ", GREEN, BG, "ENABLED", WHITE, BG, ".") end
function pp.off() ppEnabled = false SaveConfig() Msg(WHITE, BG, "PupPaths ", RED, BG, "DISABLED", WHITE, BG, ".") end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- Lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPluginInstall() LoadConfig() LoadData() pp.help() end
function OnPluginConnect() LoadConfig() LoadData() end
--------------------------------------------------------- -- GMCP: detect room change not caused by plugin ---------------------------------------------------------
function OnPluginTelnetSubnegotiation(theType, data) if theType ~= 201 then return end
local message = (data:match("^([%w%.%-_]+)") or ""):lower()
-- Track combat state if message == "char.status" then local st = data:match('"state"%s*:%s*(%d+)') if st then ppCombat = (tonumber(st) == 8) end return end
if message ~= "room.info" then return end
-- Update where we are. num is -1 for unmappable rooms (clan rooms etc.); -- we keep that value but never record or match on it. local num = tonumber(data:match('"num"%s*:%s*(%-?%d+)')) if num then -- A room.info for the room we're already in (eg from 'look') is not a -- move — ignore it so it can't reset or advance a path. if num == currentRoom then return end currentRoom = num end
if ppMoving and ppPending then -- Plugin caused this room change — confirmed move, now advance the step ppMoving = false local pname = ppPending.pname local total = ppPending.total ppPending = nil
local p = paths[pname] if p then p.pos = p.pos + 1 if p.pos > total then reachedEnd(p, pname, total) end SaveData() end return end
-- ppMoving was set but no room change arrived (failed move) — clear pending if ppMoving then ppMoving = false ppPending = nil return end
-- Room changed but NOT by the plugin. -- * Recorded paths: position is worked out from your room when you press pp, -- so we leave them alone here — walk anywhere on the path and continue. -- * Not-yet-recorded paths: any off-path move resets to step 1 (as before), -- so recording needs one clean run from start to finish. local anyChange = false for pname, p in pairs(paths) do if (not p.recorded) and p.pos > 1 then p.pos = 1 anyChange = true Msg(RED, BG, "Off-path movement on '", GREEN, BG, pname, RED, BG, "' (not yet recorded) — reset to step 1.") end end
if anyChange then SaveData() end end
function OnPluginSaveState() SaveConfig() SaveData() end
